channel.title: sifchain on Merak.run
channel.description: Recent content in sifchain on Merak.run

item.title: Blockchain Validator
item.description: Merak is a chain Validator on the following projects: Mainnet Status Validator details Stake Description of project Mainnet Merak on Nym Nym : Infrastructure to prevent leaks on data and metadata Mainnet Merak on Sifchain Via Keplr Sifchain : Crosschain DEX based on Cosmos Mainnet Merak on Umee Via Keplr Umee is a cross-chain DeFi Hub for Cosmos and Ethereum Testnets Status Validator details Stake Description of project Testnet Merak on Axelar Via Keplr Axelar : Unlocking cross-chain communication No longer participating Project Status Kira Testnet Evmos Mainnet (Genesis) Comdex Mainnet (Genesis) Pontem Testnet
